title: Fix Empty Step 1 Results When Re-Running Metrics Analyst After Completion
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to re-run the Metrics Analyst on a new dashboard after completing a previous analysis, so that I can analyze multiple dashboards in sequence without encountering empty results.
description:
After completing a full Metrics Analyst cycle (run analysis, create metrics, complete), restarting the Analyst and selecting a new dashboard results in an empty Step 1. The UX shows no data. A browser refresh resolves the issue, indicating stale state is carried over from the previous session.

Reproduction steps:
1. Run Metrics Analyst for a dashboard
2. Create a new metric from recommendations
3. Complete the workflow
4. Re-start Metrics Analyst
5. Add a new dashboard and run Step 1
6. Result: empty UX with no data
acceptance_criteria: Re-starting Metrics Analyst after completion properly resets all state
Selecting a new dashboard after restart produces Step 1 results
No browser refresh is required between analysis sessions
Previous session data does not interfere with new analysis
ux_changes: Fixed the empty state issue when re-running Metrics Analyst after a completed session. Results now display correctly without requiring a browser refresh.
middleware_changes: Fixed state cleanup on Metrics Analyst restart to properly reset previous session data before initiating a new analysis.
implementation_notes: The root cause was stale state from the previous analysis session not being cleared on restart. A HAR file was provided for debugging.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the state cleanup issue on staging.
